content.query:
SELECT 	top(1)
lds.[LeadID],
lds.[LeadSourceID],
lds.[LeadSubSourceID],
lds.[BranchID],
lds.[EntryDate],
cst.[FirstName],
cst.[LastName],
cst.[Email],
cst.[Phone],
cst.[Address1],
cst.[Address2],
cst.[City],
cst.[State],
cst.[Zip],
cst.[Zip4],
lds.[OperatingCompany]
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
WHERE
lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
and lds.OperatingCompany = 'FHI'
UNION
SELECT 	top(1)
lds.[LeadID],
lds.[LeadSourceID],
lds.[LeadSubSourceID],
lds.[BranchID],
lds.[EntryDate],
cst.[FirstName],
cst.[LastName],
cst.[Email],
cst.[Phone],
cst.[Address1],
cst.[Address2],
cst.[City],
cst.[State],

,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
